low.prompt_text: Choose the correct form: 'The message ___ intercepted.' (was/were)

mid.prompt_text: Reorder into a sentence: 'intercepted / was / last night / the transmission'.
correct_answers: the transmission was intercepted last night

high.prompt_text: Correct the sentence: 'The signal, along with its echoes, have been lost for hours'.
correct_answers: the signal, along with its echoes, has been lost for hours
hints: Ignore the interrupting phrase for agreement.
